COREBRAIN_API_URL.description: Where this gateway reports back to.

COREBRAIN_API_KEY.description: Personal access token from CORE → Settings → Tokens.

COREBRAIN_GATEWAY_NAME.description: Display name shown in the CORE sidebar.

COREBRAIN_GATEWAY_SECURITY_KEY.description: Auth key for the webapp. If unset, the gateway generates one and prints it to the logs on first boot.

CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN.description: Long-lived claude-code token (output of `claude setup-token`). Optional — the agent only runs when this is set.

OPENAI_API_KEY.description: OpenAI API key for codex-cli. Optional — the agent only runs when this is set.

GITHUB_TOKEN.description: PAT used by `git clone` of private repos. Author identity is fetched from the GitHub API automatically.
